jobs.prompt:
## 任务：坯布文章发布 ### 类目：坯布（slug=tanjia, category="探价"） ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/doc_735f5261f836_坯布.txt`下对应文件 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md`（必须是36小时内采集的最新资讯，非36小时内采集的内容一律不得引用） ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/坯布文章发布-06_37.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 40S/133×72, 60S/144×90, 45S/139×94, 32S/133×72, 50S/140×105, 21S/108×58, 16S/128×60, 30S/138×86 本次深度解读哪个具体坯布规格？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 # === 章节结构进化约束（本硬性约束2026-04-21注入）=== # 文章必须包含3-5个

章节，不得固定为4章 # 具体章数由文章内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章（标准深度） # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章（重点突出） # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章（信息量大） # 禁止：无论何种类型都固定写4章（AI偷懒模式） # 验证：发布前检查 h2数量 = re.findall(r']*>', html)，若<3或>5需补充或精简章节 ### 写作后必须更新追踪文件： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/坯布文章发布-06_37.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ### 图片生成```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") job_name = "坯布文章发布-06:37" chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker(job_name, chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" # 提取并校验标题（35-65字，禁止全角标点） title_match = _re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) assert title_match, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" title = title_match.group(1).strip() assert 35 <= len(title) <= 65, f"标题长度{len(title)}字（不在35-65范围），当前任务中止！" title = _re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', title) # 检查文章第一句是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） first_p_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) if first_p_match: first_p_text = first_p_match.group(1).strip() h1_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)', article_html) if h1_match and first_p_text == h1_match.group(1).strip(): raise AssertionError('文章第一段与标题完全相同，违反"标题不得作为正文开头"规则，当前任务中止！') # 清理LLM输出中的markdown代码围栏，防止```html混入正文 # 关键：必须删整个围栏块，不能只删标记不删内容 article_html = _re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = _re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # === 记录到 recent_articles（发布成功后必须执行）=== # 从最终HTML提取h2数量，用于写作差异化追踪 h2_list = re.findall(r']*>(.*?)', final_html) h2_count = len(h2_list) if h2_count == 0: raise AssertionError('h2_count=0，write_recent未被调用，查重机制失效，当前任务中止！') RECENT_FILE = os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json') DAYS_LIMIT = 15 import datetime as _dt with open(RECENT_FILE) as _f: _data = json.load(_f) _cutoff = (_dt.datetime.now() - _dt.timedelta(days=DAYS_LIMIT)).isoformat() _data['articles'] = [ a for a in _data.get('articles', []) if a.get('published_at', '') >= _cutoff ] _data['articles'].append({ 'title': title, 'topic_keywords': [], 'slug': 'tanjia', 'category': '探单', 'published_at': _dt.datetime.now().isoformat(), 'h2_count': h2_count, 'identity': '', }) with open(RECENT_FILE, 'w') as _f: json.dump(_data, _f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ```

章节，不得固定为4章 # 具体章数由文章内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章（标准深度） # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章（重点突出） # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章（信息量大） # 禁止：无论何种类型都固定写4章（AI偷懒模式） # 验证：发布前检查 h2数量 = re.findall(r']*>', html)，若<3或>5需补充或精简章节 ### 写作后必须更新追踪文件： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/内衣资讯-面料技术1.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ### 图片生成### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/内衣资讯-面料技术1.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 碳锦纶, 石墨烯纤维, 凉感纤维, 单向导湿, 抗菌纤维, 薰衣草纤维, 恒温纤维 本次深入解析哪种功能纤维或工艺？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") job_name = "内衣资讯-面料技术1" chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker(job_name, chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" # 提取并校验标题（35-65字，禁止全角标点） title_match = _re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) assert title_match, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" title = title_match.group(1).strip() assert 35 <= len(title) <= 65, f"标题长度{len(title)}字（不在35-65范围），当前任务中止！" title = _re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', title) # 检查文章第一句是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） first_p_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) if first_p_match: first_p_text = first_p_match.group(1).strip() h1_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)', article_html) if h1_match and first_p_text == h1_match.group(1).strip(): raise AssertionError('文章第一段与标题完全相同，违反"标题不得作为正文开头"规则，当前任务中止！') # 清理LLM输出中的markdown代码围栏，防止```html混入正文 # 关键：必须删整个围栏块，不能只删标记不删内容 article_html = _re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = _re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # === 记录到 recent_articles（发布成功后必须执行）=== # 从最终HTML提取h2数量，用于写作差异化追踪 h2_list = re.findall(r']*>(.*?)', final_html) h2_count = len(h2_list) if h2_count == 0: raise AssertionError('h2_count=0，write_recent未被调用，查重机制失效，当前任务中止！') RECENT_FILE = os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json') DAYS_LIMIT = 15 import datetime as _dt with open(RECENT_FILE) as _f: _data = json.load(_f) _cutoff = (_dt.datetime.now() - _dt.timedelta(days=DAYS_LIMIT)).isoformat() _data['articles'] = [ a for a in _data.get('articles', []) if a.get('published_at', '') >= _cutoff ] _data['articles'].append({ 'title': title, 'topic_keywords': [], 'slug': 'tanjia', 'category': '探单', 'published_at': _dt.datetime.now().isoformat(), 'h2_count': h2_count, 'identity': '', }) with open(RECENT_FILE, 'w') as _f: json.dump(_data, _f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ```

章节，不得固定为4章 # 具体章数由文章内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章（标准深度） # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章（重点突出） # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章（信息量大） # 禁止：无论何种类型都固定写4章（AI偷懒模式） # 验证：发布前检查 h2数量 = re.findall(r']*>', html)，若<3或>5需补充或精简章节 ### 写作后必须更新追踪文件： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/内衣商贸-工厂对接2.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ### 图片生成### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/内衣商贸-工厂对接2.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 蕾丝拿货, 泳衣面料采购, 运动内衣选品, 无缝内衣, 调整型面料 本次提供哪种内衣品类的采购指南？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") job_name = "内衣商贸-工厂对接2" chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker(job_name, chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" # 提取并校验标题（35-65字，禁止全角标点） title_match = _re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) assert title_match, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" title = title_match.group(1).strip() assert 35 <= len(title) <= 65, f"标题长度{len(title)}字（不在35-65范围），当前任务中止！" title = _re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', title) # 检查文章第一句是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） first_p_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) if first_p_match: first_p_text = first_p_match.group(1).strip() h1_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)', article_html) if h1_match and first_p_text == h1_match.group(1).strip(): raise AssertionError('文章第一段与标题完全相同，违反"标题不得作为正文开头"规则，当前任务中止！') # 清理LLM输出中的markdown代码围栏，防止```html混入正文 # 关键：必须删整个围栏块，不能只删标记不删内容 article_html = _re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = _re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # === 记录到 recent_articles（发布成功后必须执行）=== # 从最终HTML提取h2数量，用于写作差异化追踪 h2_list = re.findall(r']*>(.*?)', final_html) h2_count = len(h2_list) if h2_count == 0: raise AssertionError('h2_count=0，write_recent未被调用，查重机制失效，当前任务中止！') RECENT_FILE = os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json') DAYS_LIMIT = 15 import datetime as _dt with open(RECENT_FILE) as _f: _data = json.load(_f) _cutoff = (_dt.datetime.now() - _dt.timedelta(days=DAYS_LIMIT)).isoformat() _data['articles'] = [ a for a in _data.get('articles', []) if a.get('published_at', '') >= _cutoff ] _data['articles'].append({ 'title': title, 'topic_keywords': [], 'slug': 'tanjia', 'category': '探单', 'published_at': _dt.datetime.now().isoformat(), 'h2_count': h2_count, 'identity': '', }) with open(RECENT_FILE, 'w') as _f: json.dump(_data, _f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ```

## 任务：家居布艺-软装地毯发布 ### 类目：家居布艺（slug=tanhuo, category="探货"） ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cron/output/knowledge_base_jiaju/jiaju_knowledge.md` 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md`（必须是36小时内采集的最新资讯） ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/家居布艺-软装地毯.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 羊毛地毯, 尼龙地毯, 手工地毯, 机制地毯, 印花地毯, 拼块地毯 本次从哪种维度讲地毯选购？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 # === 章节结构进化约束（本硬性约束2026-04-21注入）=== # 文章必须包含3-5个

## 任务：家居布艺-工厂动态发布 ### 类目：家居布艺（slug=tanhuo, category="探货"） ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cron/output/knowledge_base_jiaju/jiaju_knowledge.md` 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md`（必须是36小时内采集的最新资讯） ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/家居布艺-工厂动态.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 工厂开工, 产业转移, 设备更新, 展会展品, 原材料涨价, 出口数据 本次结合trend报道哪种家居工厂动态？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 # === 章节结构进化约束（本硬性约束2026-04-21注入）=== # 文章必须包含3-5个

jobs.prompt:
## 任务：家居布艺-行业数据发布 ### 类目：家居布艺（slug=tanhuo, category="探货"） ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cron/output/knowledge_base_jiaju/jiaju_knowledge.md` 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md`（必须是36小时内采集的最新资讯） ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/家居布艺-行业数据.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 天猫窗帘数据, 京东家纺数据, 出口数据, 消费者偏好, 热销品类 本次引用哪种家居行业的电商或消费数据？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 # === 章节结构进化约束（本硬性约束2026-04-21注入）=== # 文章必须包含3-5个

章节，不得固定为4章 # 具体章数由文章内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章（标准深度） # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章（重点突出） # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章（信息量大） # 禁止：无论何种类型都固定写4章（AI偷懒模式） # 验证：发布前检查 h2数量 = re.findall(r']*>', html)，若<3或>5需补充或精简章节 ### 写作后必须更新追踪文件： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/家居布艺-行业数据.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ### 图片生成### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/家居布艺-行业数据.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 天猫窗帘数据, 京东家纺数据, 出口数据, 消费者偏好, 热销品类 本次引用哪种家居行业的电商或消费数据？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") job_name = "家居布艺-行业数据" chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker(job_name, chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" # 提取并校验标题（35-65字，禁止全角标点） title_match = _re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) assert title_match, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" title = title_match.group(1).strip() assert 35 <= len(title) <= 65, f"标题长度{len(title)}字（不在35-65范围），当前任务中止！" title = _re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', title) # 检查文章第一句是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） first_p_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) if first_p_match: first_p_text = first_p_match.group(1).strip() h1_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)', article_html) if h1_match and first_p_text == h1_match.group(1).strip(): raise AssertionError('文章第一段与标题完全相同，违反"标题不得作为正文开头"规则，当前任务中止！') # 清理LLM输出中的markdown代码围栏，防止```html混入正文 # 关键：必须删整个围栏块，不能只删标记不删内容 article_html = _re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = _re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # === 记录到 recent_articles（发布成功后必须执行）=== # 从最终HTML提取h2数量，用于写作差异化追踪 h2_list = re.findall(r']*>(.*?)', final_html) h2_count = len(h2_list) if h2_count == 0: raise AssertionError('h2_count=0，write_recent未被调用，查重机制失效，当前任务中止！') RECENT_FILE = os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json') DAYS_LIMIT = 15 import datetime as _dt with open(RECENT_FILE) as _f: _data = json.load(_f) _cutoff = (_dt.datetime.now() - _dt.timedelta(days=DAYS_LIMIT)).isoformat() _data['articles'] = [ a for a in _data.get('articles', []) if a.get('published_at', '') >= _cutoff ] _data['articles'].append({ 'title': title, 'topic_keywords': [], 'slug': 'tanjia', 'category': '探单', 'published_at': _dt.datetime.now().isoformat(), 'h2_count': h2_count, 'identity': '', }) with open(RECENT_FILE, 'w') as _f: json.dump(_data, _f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ```

第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # ## 任务：探单（tandan）文章发布 ### 类目：电商（slug=tandan, category="探单"） ### 方向：B2B采购：工厂货源/供应商筛选/比价/采购避坑 ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 写作素材： 1. 知识库：`~/.hermes/cron/output/knowledge_base_diangu/diangu_knowledge.md` 2. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md`（必须是36小时内采集的最新资讯） ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/B2B采购-文章发布-11_01.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 工厂货源/供应商筛选/比价方法/询价技巧/样品验证 本次讲哪种B2B采购场景的避坑方法？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 # === 章节结构进化约束（本硬性约束2026-04-21注入）=== # 文章必须包含3-5个

章节，不得固定为4章 # 具体章数由文章内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章（标准深度） # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章（重点突出） # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章（信息量大） # 禁止：无论何种类型都固定写4章（AI偷懒模式） # 验证：发布前检查 h2数量 = re.findall(r']*>', html)，若<3或>5需补充或精简章节 ### 写作后必须更新追踪文件： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/B2B采购-文章发布-11_01.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ### 图片生成```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") job_name = "B2B采购-文章发布-11:01" chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker(job_name, chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" # 提取并校验标题（35-65字，禁止全角标点） title_match = _re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) assert title_match, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" title = title_match.group(1).strip() assert 35 <= len(title) <= 65, f"标题长度{len(title)}字（不在35-65范围），当前任务中止！" title = _re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', title) # 检查文章第一句是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） first_p_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) if first_p_match: first_p_text = first_p_match.group(1).strip() h1_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)', article_html) if h1_match and first_p_text == h1_match.group(1).strip(): raise AssertionError('文章第一段与标题完全相同，违反"标题不得作为正文开头"规则，当前任务中止！') # 清理LLM输出中的markdown代码围栏，防止```html混入正文 # 关键：必须删整个围栏块，不能只删标记不删内容 article_html = _re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = _re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # === 记录到 recent_articles（发布成功后必须执行）=== # 从最终HTML提取h2数量，用于写作差异化追踪 h2_list = re.findall(r']*>(.*?)', final_html) h2_count = len(h2_list) if h2_count == 0: raise AssertionError('h2_count=0，write_recent未被调用，查重机制失效，当前任务中止！') RECENT_FILE = os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json') DAYS_LIMIT = 15 import datetime as _dt with open(RECENT_FILE) as _f: _data = json.load(_f) _cutoff = (_dt.datetime.now() - _dt.timedelta(days=DAYS_LIMIT)).isoformat() _data['articles'] = [ a for a in _data.get('articles', []) if a.get('published_at', '') >= _cutoff ] _data['articles'].append({ 'title': title, 'topic_keywords': [], 'slug': 'tanjia', 'category': '探单', 'published_at': _dt.datetime.now().isoformat(), 'h2_count': h2_count, 'identity': '', }) with open(RECENT_FILE, 'w') as _f: json.dump(_data, _f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ```

', article_html) if first_p_match: first_p_text = first_p_match.group(1).strip() h1_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)', article_html) if h1_match and first_p_text == h1_match.group(1).strip(): raise AssertionError('文章第一段与标题完全相同，违反"标题不得作为正文开头"规则，当前任务中止！') # 清理LLM输出中的markdown代码围栏，防止```html混入正文 # 关键：必须删整个围栏块，不能只删标记不删内容 article_html = _re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = _re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # === 记录到 recent_articles（发布成功后必须执行）=== # 从最终HTML提取h2数量，用于写作差异化追踪 h2_list = re.findall(r']*>(.*?)', final_html) h2_count = len(h2_list) if h2_count == 0: raise AssertionError('h2_count=0，write_recent未被调用，查重机制失效，当前任务中止！') RECENT_FILE = os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json') DAYS_LIMIT = 15 import datetime as _dt with open(RECENT_FILE) as _f: _data = json.load(_f) _cutoff = (_dt.datetime.now() - _dt.timedelta(days=DAYS_LIMIT)).isoformat() _data['articles'] = [ a for a in _data.get('articles', []) if a.get('published_at', '') >= _cutoff ] _data['articles'].append({ 'title': title, 'topic_keywords': [], 'slug': 'tanjia', 'category': '探单', 'published_at': _dt.datetime.now().isoformat(), 'h2_count': h2_count, 'identity': '', }) with open(RECENT_FILE, 'w') as _f: json.dump(_data, _f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ```

jobs.prompt:
## 任务：探路（tanlu）文章发布 — 招商/展会/活动/营销 ### 类目：探路（slug=tanlu, category="探路"） ### 内容方向：纺织行业招商加盟、展会论坛、活动峰会、营销事件（每次选一种活动类型报道） ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 写作素材： 1. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` - 从trend文件中筛选所有与"招商加盟"、"展会论坛"、"活动峰会"、"营销推广"相关的内容 - 只采集36小时内发生的最新活动资讯 2. 背景知识：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下相关行业文件 ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/探路-招商展会活动-上午.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 纺织展会/招商加盟会/行业论坛/新品发布会/产业峰会/采购对接会 本次报道哪种活动并提炼对读者的价值？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 # === 章节结构进化约束（本硬性约束2026-04-21注入）=== # 文章必须包含3-5个

第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # jobs.name: 探路-招商展会活动-下午
jobs.prompt:
## 任务：探路（tanlu）文章发布 — 招商/展会/活动/营销 ### 类目：探路（slug=tanlu, category="探路"） ### 内容方向：纺织行业招商加盟、展会论坛、活动峰会、营销事件（每次选一种活动类型报道） ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 ### 写作素材： 1. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` - 从trend文件中筛选所有与"招商加盟"、"展会论坛"、"活动峰会"、"营销推广"相关的内容 - 只采集36小时内发生的最新活动资讯 2. 背景知识：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下相关行业文件 ### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/探路-招商展会活动-下午.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 行业论坛/培训活动/招商路演/政府产业会/电商峰会/供应链大会 本次报道哪种活动并提炼对读者的价值？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 # === 章节结构进化约束（本硬性约束2026-04-21注入）=== # 文章必须包含3-5个

章节，不得固定为4章 # 具体章数由文章内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章（标准深度） # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章（重点突出） # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章（信息量大） # 禁止：无论何种类型都固定写4章（AI偷懒模式） # 验证：发布前检查 h2数量 = re.findall(r']*>', html)，若<3或>5需补充或精简章节 ### 写作后必须更新追踪文件： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/探路-招商展会活动-下午.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ### 图片生成### 上次写过的主题（读取后不得重复）： 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/探路-招商展会活动-下午.txt`，如果文件存在，提取其中记录的所有话题作为「已用过」名单，本篇文章必须从以下可选列表中选一个与已用名单不重复的话题（严禁选已用过的）： 可选话题（每次必须选其中一个）： 行业论坛, 培训活动, 招商路演, 政府产业会, 电商峰会, 供应链大会 本次报道哪种活动并提炼对读者的价值？ 如果所有话题均已用过，将已用名单清零，从列表中选一个重新开始。 - 标题35-60字，内容800-1200字 - 独立写作风格，不套模板。禁止固定三段式结构（背景-分析-结论）。每次必须变换文章开头方式：本次用提问式开头，下次用数据式开头，再下次用场景故事式开头。 ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" return html # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== def update_topic_tracker(job_name: str, chosen_topic: str, tracker_dir: str = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics"): slug = job_name.replace(':', '_').replace(' ', '_') filepath = os.path.join(tracker_dir, f"{slug}.txt") with open(filepath, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(chosen_topic + "\n") job_name = "探路-招商展会活动-下午" chosen_topic = "从可选话题列表中选的那个具体话题" update_topic_tracker(job_name, chosen_topic) article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" # 提取并校验标题（35-65字，禁止全角标点） title_match = _re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) assert title_match, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" title = title_match.group(1).strip() assert 35 <= len(title) <= 65, f"标题长度{len(title)}字（不在35-65范围），当前任务中止！" title = _re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', title) # 检查文章第一句是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） first_p_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)

', article_html) if first_p_match: first_p_text = first_p_match.group(1).strip() h1_match = re.search(r']*>([^<]+)', article_html) if h1_match and first_p_text == h1_match.group(1).strip(): raise AssertionError('文章第一段与标题完全相同，违反"标题不得作为正文开头"规则，当前任务中止！') # 清理LLM输出中的markdown代码围栏，防止```html混入正文 # 关键：必须删整个围栏块，不能只删标记不删内容 article_html = _re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = _re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" img_prompt_english = "英文图生prompt（16:9纯视觉场景，无文字）" img_save_dir = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/cron/output/images/" final_html = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # final_html已含真实base64图片，直接用于发布API # === 记录到 recent_articles（发布成功后必须执行）=== # 从最终HTML提取h2数量，用于写作差异化追踪 h2_list = re.findall(r']*>(.*?)', final_html) h2_count = len(h2_list) if h2_count == 0: raise AssertionError('h2_count=0，write_recent未被调用，查重机制失效，当前任务中止！') RECENT_FILE = os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json') DAYS_LIMIT = 15 import datetime as _dt with open(RECENT_FILE) as _f: _data = json.load(_f) _cutoff = (_dt.datetime.now() - _dt.timedelta(days=DAYS_LIMIT)).isoformat() _data['articles'] = [ a for a in _data.get('articles', []) if a.get('published_at', '') >= _cutoff ] _data['articles'].append({ 'title': title, 'topic_keywords': [], 'slug': 'tanjia', 'category': '探单', 'published_at': _dt.datetime.now().isoformat(), 'h2_count': h2_count, 'identity': '', }) with open(RECENT_FILE, 'w') as _f: json.dump(_data, _f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ```

jobs.name: 知识库生长-每日采集后
jobs.prompt:
## 任务：知识库自动生长 读取今日采集的 trend 文件，提取纺织行业新术语，写入候选词库。 运行命令： ``` python3 ~/.hermes/scripts/kb_grow.py ``` 如果输出包含"⚠️ 高置信度新词"，在回复中列出这些候选词。如果没有新词，回复"今日无新增候选词，知识库已是最新"。 ```python import subprocess, os, base64, urllib.request, json as _json, ssl, re as _re, datetime def gen_img_and_build_html(prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> str: os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None #
